title: exallage glabra
intro: Exallage glabra, also known as Indian calotrope, is a plant species that belongs to the family Convolvulaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Exallage glabra include relieving fever, reducing pain and inflammation, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. Exallage glabra can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as used in traditional medicine to create ointments and creams for topical application.
